description.description: Card summary. Canonical home is the HTML head (og:description); copied onto the record at publish so Contrail indexes it without parsing HTML.

coverImage.description: Card thumbnail (<1MB), NOT a bundle file. at-write fetches the og:image bytes (data: URL or external URL) at publish and uploadBlobs them. Reused as site.standard.document.coverImage and the bsky embed thumb; the render Worker serves it for og:image.

bskyPostUri.description: Companion app.bsky.feed.post written by Share (TID rkey, since app.bsky.feed.post is key:tid). Set on first Share; persists across republishes so re-Share overwrites the same post.

stdDocUri.description: This bundle's site.standard.document (key:tid, so the rkey is a server-minted TID not derivable from the slug). Set on first publish; persists across republishes so the same document is overwritten. The render Worker reads it for the <link rel="site.standard.document"> tag.

blob.description: atproto blob ref — CID (v1 raw + sha-256), mimeType, size
